basic_details.job_title: SASTRA Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: SASTRA is recruiting 1 post of Project Assistant-I with M.Pharm / M.Tech / M.Sc qualification. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 35 years | other benefits: Selected candidates will be encouraged to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA Deemed University
qualification.education_qualification: M.Pharm (Pharmaceutics) / M.Tech / M.Sc or equivalent degree in Pharmaceutical Science/Technology, Medical Nanotechnology, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology

vacancy_details.details: A total of 01 vacancy is announced for Project Assistant-I under the ANRF project.

selection_process: Selection will be based on Online Entrance Examination followed by Interview (Online). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email only. Final selection is subject to document verification.
how_to_apply: Visit the Official Google Form Open the application link: https://forms.gle/QoX6xFQQj375Rws7A

Fill the Google Form Carefully Enter your full name, date of birth, contact details, and email ID accurately. Provide complete educational qualifications (M.Pharm / M.Tech / M.Sc etc.). Mention your percentage/CGPA, year of passing, and university name. Highlight relevant experience in Drug Delivery, 3D Printing, or Pharmaceutical Technology in the experience section. Clearly mention your interest in registering for Ph.D. at SASTRA (this is preferred).

important_instructions: This is a temporary project position for 3 years. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the online exam/interview. Selected candidates are expected to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA. The University reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: SASTRA is recruiting 1 post of Project Assistant-I with M.Pharm / M.Tech / M.Sc qualification. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

rows.sastra_deemed_university_thanjavur: Engineered Polymeric Nanoparticles loaded 3D Printed Personalised Medicines by Semi-Solid Extrusion Technique for Paediatric Antiretroviral Therapy

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 01 vacancy is announced for Project Assistant-I under the ANRF project.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Deemed University Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: M.Pharm (Pharmaceutics) / M.Tech / M.Sc or equivalent degree in Pharmaceutical Science/Technology, Medical Nanotechnology, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology
Experience in Drug Delivery, 3D Printing (Pharmaceutical Dosage Forms)
Selected candidates will be encouraged to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA Deemed University

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant Fellowship Details
content_sections.text: Fellowship: Rs. 27,000 + 10% HRA (Total Rs. 29,700) per month as per ANRF norms.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Deemed University Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Online Entrance Examination followed by Interview (Online). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email only. Final selection is subject to document verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the Official Google Form Open the application link: https://forms.gle/QoX6xFQQj375Rws7A Fill the Google Form Carefully Enter your full name, date of birth, contact details, and email ID accurately. Provide complete educational qualifications (M.Pharm / M.Tech / M.Sc etc.). Mention your percentage/CGPA, year of passing, and university name. Highlight relevant experience in Drug Delivery, 3D Printing, or Pharmaceutical Technology in the experience section. Clearly mention your interest in registering for Ph.D. at SASTRA (this is preferred). Upload Required Documents (if the form allows) Updated CV / Resume (PDF) Scanned copies of Marksheets & Degree Certificates Experience certificates (if any) GATE / NET scorecard (if applicable) Passport size photograph Review and Submit Double-check all entered information before clicking Submit. After successful submission, you will receive a confirmation email (keep it safe). Last Date Apply on or before 15 July 2026. After Application Shortlisted candidates will be informed only via email about the date and time of the Online Entrance Examination and Interview. Keep your registered email active and check spam/junk folder regularly.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for SASTRA Project Assistant Candidates 2026
content_sections.text: This is a temporary project position for 3 years. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the online exam/interview. Selected candidates are expected to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA. The University reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SASTRA Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the Google Form is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the fellowship amount for Project Assistant-I at SASTRA University?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 27,000 + 10% HRA (Rs. 29,700) per month.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for SASTRA ANRF Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: M.Pharm (Pharmaceutics), M.Tech, or M.Sc in Pharmaceutical Science, Biotechnology, Biomedical Engineering or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. Is PhD compulsory for SASTRA Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: No, but selected candidates will be encouraged to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA Deemed University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the online Google Form: https://forms.gle/QoX6xFQQj375Rws7A

faq.question: Q7. What is the project title at SASTRA University ANRF recruitment?
faq.answer: “Engineered Polymeric Nanoparticles loaded 3D Printed Personalised Medicines by Semi-Solid Extrusion Technique for Paediatric Antiretroviral Therapy”.

faq.question: Q8. Will there be an interview for SASTRA Project Assistant selection?
faq.answer: Yes, selection includes an online entrance examination followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience mandatory for SASTRA Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Experience in Drug Delivery and 3D Printing of Pharmaceutical Dosage Forms is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Is the SASTRA Project Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary 3-year project position under ANRF funding.
